svg.title: Runtime view: one ticket from generation to resolution
svg.desc: Sequence diagram with five lifelines — generator, orchestrator, worker, memory, platform — and time flowing downward. Shows a Spectrum-class ticket emitted, pre-attached lessons retrieved, work order dispatched, the worker cycling through think and act steps (read the model, query memory, propose a diff), verification passing, resolution submitted, classified as systemic, and a lesson written.
svg.text: think: needs CI guard, not just rename
